        "A": "5, ['Requesting confirmation of whether the purchase is individual or joint (application type not covered by financing_options)', 'Requesting spouse or partner employer details (personal employment data not represented)', 'Requesting spouse or partner income details (income not represented in any template field)', 'Offering dual-income qualification or discount programs based on combined income (no field for joint qualification or income-based discounts)', 'Offering household relocation bundle discounts contingent on employment verification (no field for income-based discount or employment verification)']"
    },

        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "9, ['Providing property listings with type, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, and neighborhood', 'Providing property features such as balcony, patio, open-concept layout, and proximity to transit', 'Providing financing options including interest rate, down payment, and mortgage term', 'Listing required documentation such as bank statements, ID, tax returns, and proof of funds', 'Providing legal service options with estimated costs and timelines', 'Providing moving service options with costs, features, and scheduling', 'Providing utility setup packages with included services and prices', 'Offering cost optimization or bundled service packages (partially mappable under service_packages and total_package_summary)', 'Requesting standard documentation for mortgage prequalification (maps to financing_options.documentation_required)']"
    }
}
